sample.plot: A lowly utility worker is called to the future by a mysterious radio signal, he must leave his dying wife to embark on a journey that will force him to face his deepest fears in an attempt to change the fabric of reality and save humankind from its greatest environmental crisis yet.

sample.title: Cloud Atlas
sample.plot: Everything is connected: an 1849 diary of an ocean voyage across the Pacific, letters from a composer to his lover, a thriller about a conspiracy at a nuclear power plant, a farce about a publisher in a nursing home;, a rebellious clone in futuristic Korea, and the tale of a tribe living on post-apocalyptic Hawaii far in the future.

sample.title: Upgrade
sample.plot: Grey's a stay-at-home mechanic, whose wife is Asha. One day, Grey asks Asha to help him return a car to his client. Whilst Grey and Asha's self-driving car malfunctions, it crashes. Grey watches helplessly as Asha bleeds to death next to him. Grey returns home - a widowed quadriplegic, under the care of his mother. His wife's death and the inability of police to identify their attackers cause him to sink into a depression. After a suicide attempt, he's offered to have high tech chip implanted - enabling him to walk. Though initially hesitant, he's persuaded to have the surgery.

categories.label: climate damage remaking the land
categories.description: The natural world has been pushed into crisis, making breathable air, fertile ground, and stable seasons uncertain parts of life. What you'll see: red dust, failing crops, sealed interiors, improvised masks, and landscapes marked by ruin and scarcity.

categories.label: machines woven into ordinary routines
categories.description: Advanced devices are not rare wonders but fixtures of transport, work, medicine, and the home. What you'll see: self-driving cars, talking systems, automated doors, diagnostic screens, and people moving through spaces built around constant machine service.

categories.label: human bodies altered by implanted craft
categories.description: The boundary between flesh and device has grown thin, with implanted mechanisms used to restore movement, sharpen ability, or extend control. What you'll see: surgical interfaces, hidden chips, body-scanning equipment, and people treating enhancement as a practical answer to injury or weakness.

categories.label: remote powers steering everyday lives
categories.description: Large systems of authority shape ordinary existence from a distance, whether through technical oversight, secretive planning, or commands carried across time. What you'll see: monitored spaces, controlled access, cryptic transmissions, and individuals hemmed in by decisions made elsewhere.

categories.label: survival depending on fragile resources
categories.description: Basic continuance rests on supplies that can fail, be rationed, or be monopolised when the wider world is under strain. What you'll see: concern over air, energy, food, and water, along with storage rooms, failing infrastructure, and anxious talk about what remains.

categories.label: oceania split between enclaves and wastes
categories.description: The region appears as a patchwork of protected settlements, high-tech compounds, and exposed stretches where order has broken down. What you'll see: gleaming interiors set against harsh open country, guarded thresholds, isolated homesteads, and journeys across empty or dangerous ground.

categories.label: memory and record outlasting one lifetime
categories.description: In these futures, messages, archives, and traces of past lives carry unusual weight because they guide action long after their makers are gone. What you'll see: recorded voices, preserved documents, recovered data, and relics treated as keys to understanding the present world.

categories.label: old belief returning after worldly collapse
categories.description: When advanced orders fail or become distant, people rebuild meaning through prophecy, omen, ritual, and reverence for half-understood remains. What you'll see: sacred storytelling, fearful respect for relics, warnings about forbidden knowledge, and communities reading destiny in the remnants around them.

categories.label: high craft beside broken public order
categories.description: Technical sophistication survives unevenly, so marvels of engineering exist alongside weak policing, social mistrust, and failing common institutions. What you'll see: elegant gadgets, advanced laboratories, underpowered authorities, vulnerable households, and streets where danger slips past the official watch.
